svg.title: VisionGuard system architecture diagram
svg.desc: Seven-stage pipeline from video input through YOLO detection, depth estimation, TTC calculation, conditions detection, RL alert agent, to overlay output, with a Streamlit UI wrapper.

g.text: Streamlit web app · video upload · IP Webcam live feed
YOLOv8n fine-tuned · 3,438 Indian road images · mAP50 0.777
DepthAnything v2 Small · distance in metres · no LiDAR needed
Match bbox to depth · linear regression · seconds to collision
Night · rain · fog · glare · brightness + blur analysis
No alert · caution · warning · brake now
Bounding boxes · distance labels · risk bar 0–100
Alert text · conditions badge · dashboard panel · sound

svg.text: YOLOv8 · DepthAnything v2 · Stable-Baselines3 · OpenCV · Streamlit · Python 3.12
